title: Main Branch bug - Sign Up
description: Can't sign up on Main, check New URL etc (GitHub #12)
design: Root causes: (1) Convex prod env CONVEX_SITE_URL and SITE_URL wrong/missing (2) Netlify main branch using wrong Convex URLs (3) Convex Auth redirect/origin not allowing prod (or new Pepl) URL. Plan: docs/plans/EMA-1-signup-main-branch.md - Verify Convex prod env, Netlify prod env, Auth allowlist; test sign-up on main; coordinate with #7 for Pepl.co.za.

title: Display Version Number in App Front End
description: We need a way to display a version number or something in the front end. The user needs to know if they need to refresh their browser to get the latest version. Also if we as the developers ask a user what version they are seeing, they need to be able to tell us. We need to think of a nice automated way of doing this. (GitHub #15)

title: EMA-3: Design doc and Convex schema for report column preferences
description: Write docs/plans/EMA-3-reports-customizable-lists.md; add reportColumnPreferences table (or userProfiles field) and Convex query/mutation for get/set column preferences per user per report.

title: EMA-3: Employee Report page (route, nav, page shell)
description: Add route /reports/employees, nav entry (Reports or Employee Report), and EmployeeReportPage shell with title and placeholder table.

title: EMA-3: Column picker UI and Convex read/write for selected columns
description: Define listable employee columns; column picker control; Convex get/set preferences for current user and report.

title: EMA-3: Report table with selected columns and Edit link
description: Table renders only selected columns; each row has Edit link to /employees/:id/edit.

title: EMA-3: Vitest + RTL tests for Employee Report
description: Vitest and React Testing Library setup; tests for column visibility, Convex persistence, Edit link.

title: EMA-3: Playwright E2E setup and E2E test for Employee Report
description: Playwright install and config; E2E test: open Employee Report, change columns, click Edit, verify navigation.

title: Custom Fields - Calculations
description: Tax Year Start Date - Calculated, need to check how it is currently calculated. Duplicated Address Fields - Need to check how it's currently done. Check all fields currently in the Carara Access App (GitHub #11)

title: Reports - Customizable Lists
description: Create lists that are customised, you must have the ability to choose which columns to view. Also quick link to edit (GitHub #10)

title: Add Bank Details Fields
description: Add bank details to employee table (GitHub #9)

title: Multiple Contract Templates
description: Add the functionality to set up multiple contract templates (GitHub #8)
design: Plan: docs/plans/EMA-5-multiple-contract-templates.md - Multiple named templates per org, default template, per-template fields and employer signature; template picker on new contract; snapshot company name and employer signature on contract at create (Option B).

title: Update production Netlify URL
description: Use the Pepl.co.za domain, change in Netlify. Update all relevant variables (GitHub #7)

title: Camera selection on mobile
description: Scanner uses front camera, photo uses back camera. Scanner should default to back camera. Probably need to build in camera selection for the user (GitHub #6)

title: Date Fields on Mobile - Overlapping
description: Looks like date Fields are overlapping on occasion on Mobile (GitHub #5)

title: Logo on Log In Screen
description: Still using old logo, need to update it (GitHub #4)
design: Plan: docs/plans/EMA-9-logo-login-screen.md - Replace placeholder P on login with Pepl logo; ensure logo asset exists and use in SignInPage.
